== Notes for [[Item:Q83292|Q83292]] ==

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saffiyah_bint_%E2%80%98Abd_al-Muttalib

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harith_ibn_Harb

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3142A3D941EFBC189822EF79916C9799
geni:6000000025124588552

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
